mapper.select: select id, rfid, lot_no, bind_time, status from ticket_rfid_lot_binding where rfid = #{rfid} and status = '0' order by bind_time desc limit 1
select id, rfid, lot_no, bind_time, status from ticket_rfid_lot_binding where lot_no = #{lotNo} and status = '0' order by bind_time desc limit 1
mapper.update: update ticket_rfid_lot_binding set status = '1' where rfid = #{rfid} and status = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into ticket_rfid_lot_binding (rfid, lot_no, bind_time, status) values (#{rfid}, #{lotNo}, now(), '0')
